name: Tiara Minamoto
description: Tiara is the younger sister of Kou and Teru Minamoto, and the eldest daughter of the Minamoto clan. She is shown to be a cheerful girl both in off the bonus illustrations and spin-off manga. She calls the Mokkes cute and doesn't even hesitate to rescue a Mokke from a huge, insect-like monster, hence showing that she isn't scared of the supernatural. ~!Apparently, her spiritual powers far surpass that of Teru's even in her young age, making her the most powerful member of the siblings.!~

name: Yuiko Enomoto
description: __Height:__ 152 cm She is a rich girl with thick eyebrows who serves as the student council vice-president. Formerly the Student Council President, she resigns due to Natsuo Maki not relying on her, but she is later reinstated as vice-president. She and Sayori Mizushima are close friends. Eno also has a brother who is rather unstable and proclaims himself as a masochist, much to Eno's dismay. Eno finds herself falling in love with Minami Middle School's president Toda Haruka.

name: Yukine Mea
description: The shy personal servant of Maria, who functions much like Chiaia does to Lashara, she is quiet and faithful. Her quiet, shy demeanor hides a very talented skillset. Yukine acts as Maria's primary information-gatherer, and the two of them are able to figure out that Kenshi is the Seikijin pilot that attacked Lashara. name: Yumi Yoshizawa
description: Ken's love interest, a girl that left Japan to become a cop in the department in charge of organized crime. Her true name is Yumi and she is actually Japanese. ~!She hates gangsters, later it is discovered that she is the daughter of a Japanese Yakuza Boss that killed Ken's parents. Her hatred of gangs is due to her mother and sister being killed by other Yakuza when she was young. name: Aiga Akaba
description: Aiga Akaba is the main protagonist of the anime and manga series, Beyblade Burst Turbo. After witnessing the strength of Valt Aoi and his Wonder Valtryek V4 12 Volcanic, he creates his own Turbo Beyblade, Z Achilles A4 11 Xtend, and becomes a Blader. He then sets out on journey to the big city to challenge and defeat Valt; a goal he eventually achieves with the dark power of his Turbo Beyblade.

name: Amane Kasai
description: The student council president at Shinsen Middle School. Her family runs a fruits and café parlor called "Fruits Parlor KASAI". Amane is a refined, diligent, kind, and thoughtful person. Because she cares about everyone around her, she can be very stubborn. She is also known to have a strong sense of justice. name: Anna Komiya
description: She is [Takashi](https://anilist.co/character/125237)'s older sister-in-law. Beautiful and gentle. She is the student president at the school. She is smart and the object of admiration throughout the school. She is kind to Takashi, but she doesn't care as much as she used to. Since she has a personality that is relied on by everyone and builds up her stress, it seems that she goes out to the streets at night to release her energy...

name: Aphelandra
description: __Affiliations:__ Kuja Pirates Aphelandra is a member of a tribe of Kuja living on the island of Amazon Lily. She is large-sized human who accompanied Marguerite and Sweet Pea when they found Luffy covered in mushrooms. Despite her size, Aphelandra has shown to be rather timid, often repeating what others have said to her as she obeys their command. She is a kind and innocent woman.
